prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 27048→28908→28267→30768→28841 名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024 年达到区间高点 30768 名后 2025 年回弹至 28841 名；近 5 年位次中枢约 28700 名，2025 年基准约 28841 名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年依次为 64、65、66、67、69 人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026 年计划大幅缩减至 58 人，较 2025 年减少约 15.9%，缩招幅度显著，理论上使竞争压力略有缓解，位次数字有下移倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（北京）为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名 2021 年第 58 名、2022–2025 年稳定在第 48 名左右，2026 年降至第 62 名，整体处于全国中上游水平，在能源类高校中具有标杆地位；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音平台热度一般，未进入总排名前 100，短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度无明显升温信号；石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程为该校传统优势学科（第四轮学科评估 A+ 和 A-），化学工程与技术、安全科学与工程等亦具较强实力；石油工程、油气储运工程、化工与制药类等招生专业与优势学科高度匹配，对行业意向明确的考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于北京市，对江苏省考生属跨省报考；学校在江苏省招生计划占比较小（2025 年物理类 69 人），无显著本省倾斜；北京高校对江苏考生整体吸引力稳定；能源类、化工类专业社会热度整体平稳，计算机、人工智能等新工科专业热度较高；江苏省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 52.1 万，较 2025 年（约 35.8 万）大幅增长约 45.7%，物理类考生估算从 26.1 万增至约 38 万，竞争显著加剧，反映整体竞争环境趋紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 28841 名、2026 年招生计划大幅缩招约 15.9%（使位次数字下移）、江苏省物理类考生数大幅增长约 45.7%（使竞争加剧、位次数字上移）以及学校声誉平稳等因素，缩招与考生增加效应部分对冲；以 ，考虑考生数大幅增加带来的竞争压力，小幅上调后预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 26283 名，区间 25783–26783 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 27048 → 28908 → 28267 → 30768 → 28841, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend. In 2024, it reached a high of 30768, then rebounded to 28841 in 2025. The 5-year median ranking is about 28700, with a 2025 baseline of 28841. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu from 2021 to 2025 was 64, 65, 66, 67, and 69 students respectively, showing a gradual expansion. In 2026, the plan sharply decreases to 58 students, a reduction of about 15.9% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly and tends to lower the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science ranking was 58th in 2021, stable around 48th from 2022 to 2025, and dropped to 62nd in 2026, overall at the upper-middle level nationally, with a benchmark status among energy universities. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. On Douyin, its popularity is average, not in the top 100 overall, with low short video exposure and no clear increase in application attention. Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are its traditional advantageous disciplines (A+ and A- in the fourth round of discipline evaluation), and Chemical Engineering and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering are also strong. Majors like Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, and Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering are highly matched with its advantageous disciplines, attracting students with clear industry intentions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, making it an inter-provincial application for Jiangsu students. Its enrollment plan in Jiangsu is relatively small (69 students in Physics Category in 2025), with no significant local preference. Beijing universities generally maintain stable appeal to Jiangsu students. The social popularity of energy and chemical majors is generally stable, while new engineering majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence are highly popular. In 2026, the total number of Jiangsu Gaokao examinees is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.7% from 2025 (about 358,000). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees increases from 261,000 to about 380,000, intensifying competition and reflecting a tighter overall competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 28841, the significant enrollment reduction of about 15.9% in 2026 (which lowers the ranking number), the large increase of about 45.7% in Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu (which intensifies competition and raises the ranking number), and the stable university reputation, the effects of enrollment reduction and examinee increase partially offset each other. Taking into account the increased competition from the surge in examinees, a slight upward adjustment leads to a predicted 2026 minimum ranking of about 26283 for Physics Category, with a range of 25783–26783.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 26283, with a range of 25783–26783. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<25783), you can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors such as Petroleum Engineering (Carbon Neutrality Energy Innovation Class) and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is near the lower limit (>26783), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university's petroleum engineering disciplines are outstanding with high industry recognition, suitable for students with intentions in the energy industry.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 5713→5832→5997→5958→5558, fluctuating narrowly within the 5500–6000 range. In 2025, it rebounded to 5558, the best level in the past five years, with small fluctuations and relatively stable trends. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu Province from 2021 to 2025 was 6, 6, 5, 4, 3 students respectively, showing a continuous reduction trend. The 2026 plan remains at 3 students, unchanged from 2025, with a very small scale that has stabilized at 3 for two consecutive years, having a neutral impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 62nd in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking (2026). It is a science and engineering university with few majors in History Category, and its overall level has limited appeal to liberal arts candidates. Reputation is stable with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average. Only the Ideological and Political Education major is offered in History Category, so attention is limited. The university is known for its strengths in petroleum and petrochemical engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Ideological and Political Education major is stable. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province is about 141,000, an increase of approximately 45.7% from 2025 (97,000), significantly intensifying competition, which is steadily rising. Beijing universities have some appeal to liberal arts candidates in Jiangsu, but this university only enrolls 3 students in History Category, a very small scale, making rankings susceptible to individual candidate application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5558, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the significant increase of about 45.7% in History Category candidates, intensified competition puts upward pressure on ranking numbers. Taking into account the increased competition from the rise in candidate numbers, after a slight upward adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 5638, with a range of 5138–6138.
